title: Cozy Living Room with Warm Lighting and Comfortable Furniture
description: A cozy and inviting living room featuring a beige sofa with multiple cushions, a wooden coffee table with books and a cup, a comfortable armchair, a lit fireplace, soft warm lighting from lamps and candles, simple elegant decor, and large windows with sheer curtains overlooking a garden. The room is styled with natural tones, wooden flooring, and green plants, creating a relaxed and comfortable atmosphere.
